message:
Fix Windows platform glue and clean lints

- align windows-rs calls: GetVolumeInformationW/CreateFileW, PDH sampling, LastInputInfo imports

- rework IFilter loader/init, add COM flags, safer chunk/text handling

- add missing windows features and dependency fixes for ipc client, scheduler, ui defaults

- fill MFT metadata with sizes when paths resolve and stabilize volume ordering

files.patch:
@@ -22,6 +22,7 @@ zip = "6.0.0"
 sha2 = "0.10.9"
 reqwest = { version = "0.12.24", features = ["stream"] }
 which = "8.0.0"
+windows = { workspace = true }
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 tempfile = "*"

@@ -1,7 +1,3 @@
-[features]
-default = []
-windows-driver = ["windows"]
-
 [package]
 name = "ntfs-watcher"
 version = "0.1.0"
@@ -18,5 +14,5 @@ sysinfo = { workspace = true }
 thiserror = { workspace = true }
 
 [target.'cfg(windows)'.dependencies]
-windows = { workspace = true, optional = true }
+windows = { workspace = true }
 usn-journal-rs = "*"
